name: LabWindows/CVI User Interface Attribute Picker Catalog
description: Header-derived contextual menus and typed value suggestions for User Interface Set*Attribute helpers.
limitations: The public headers do not contain the proprietary CVI function-panel validity matrices. Menus are context-scoped from documented ATTR_* families and exclude declarations marked not settable.
